message:
feat(search,lib,sources,storage): major search query expansion, source sync improvements, and storage/export hardening

Search query:
- Major expansion of the search query module (~624 lines changed) with
  improved query building, result processing, and progressive search
  integration

Core lib:
- Expand export and session handling with additional validation and
  error propagation paths

Sources:
- Expand source sync with additional reconciliation logic and edge case
  handling

Storage:
- Expand SQLite storage with additional query capabilities

Other:
- Daemon core minor adjustments
- Page component minor fixes (encrypt, key_management, wizard)
- UI app minor adjustments

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
